mnemonics: Sangwon LEE: Loves Ethical Engineering. This mnemonic connects the name Sangwon Lee to a core principle of Human-Centred AI, which is prioritizing ethical engineering practices.
keyPoints: Sangwon Lee is a researcher known for his work in Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) and Human-Centred AI.
His research focuses on designing AI systems that augment human capabilities and are aligned with human values and ethics.
A key contribution is exploring how to make AI systems more understandable, controllable, and trustworthy from a user's perspective.
commonMistakes: Assuming Sangwon Lee's work is solely about technical AI performance, rather than the human experience of using AI.
Confusing his research area with the broader field of AI; it is specifically centred on the intersection of HCI and AI.
